name: Chocolate Chip Tub Cookies
recipeInstructions: Beat butter at medium speed with an electric mixer. Gradually add sugars, beating until blended. Add egg, sour cream, and vanilla, mixing well. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt; stir into butter mixture until just combined. Stir in chocolate morsels and pecans. Divide dough into 2 airtight gift containers. Refrigerate up to 4 weeks. When ready to bake, drop tablespoonfuls of dough onto lightly greased cookie sheets. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes. Transfer to wire racks to cool. Yield: 2 dozen cookies.
